changes.description: Import resolution phase: build_file_index mapping dotted module paths to FILE node IDs, resolve_import for absolute/relative/from-imports, process_imports creating IMPORTS edges with symbols property, stdlib skip via sys.stdlib_module_names

Call tracing phase with confidence scoring: find_containing_symbol via bisect, tiered resolution (self/cls receiver=0.8, same-file=1.0, import-resolved=1.0, global-fuzzy=0.5), CALL_BLOCKLIST for builtins, process_calls creating CALLS edges
Heritage phase: process_heritage creating EXTENDS and IMPLEMENTS edges from heritage tuples, cross-file resolution via class_index, same-file preference
Symbols phase: process_symbols creating FUNCTION/CLASS/METHOD nodes with DEFINES edges, decorator storage in properties
Full indexing pipeline: walk → structure → symbols → imports → calls → heritage, incremental logic comparing file hashes, stale file cleanup, query() by name
13 tests covering build_file_index, absolute/from/relative imports, process_imports, stdlib skipping, symbols property
10 tests covering find_containing_symbol, blocklist, same-file/import-resolved/self-method/global-fuzzy resolution, module-level caller
8 tests covering EXTENDS/IMPLEMENTS edges, cross-file resolution, symbols phase (function/class/method nodes, DEFINES edges, decorators)
11 tests covering full pipeline: file/folder/function/class nodes, imports/calls/extends edges, incremental skip/detect, query by name
Updated 2 stub tests to match implemented index() and query() methods

verification.command: python3 -m pytest tests/test_context_imports.py tests/test_context_calls.py tests/test_context_heritage.py tests/test_context_pipeline.py -x
